# Fixture Corpus

This directory holds the checked-in OOXML corpus used by the integration tests.

The corpus is intentionally minimal and redistributable:

- It is authored in this repository.
- It uses hand-written OOXML parts and ZIP packaging generated by the test helper.
- It does not include files copied from Microsoft Office, LibreOffice, or Google Workspace.

Layout:

- `corpus/` contains the OOXML source trees that are zipped at test time.
- `snapshots/` contains the versioned expected outputs.
- `provenance/` contains one note per fixture with source and redistribution status.

Current fixtures:

- `corpus/docx/basic`
- `corpus/xlsx/basic`
- `corpus/xlsx/app-metadata`
- `corpus/pptx/basic`
- `corpus/docx/external-target`
